name: Healthy Banana Bread
recipeIngredient: 10 tbsp Light Corn Oil Spread (1-1/2 sticks)
6 oz Frozen apple juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Grease a 9" x 5" loaf pan.
- In a large bowl, mix together the first seven ingredients until well combined.
- Using a pastry blender, cut in the corn oil spread into the mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
- Stir in the mashed bananas, thawed apple juice concentrate, egg substitute, walnuts, and vanilla extract until the flour is moistened.
- Spoon the batter into the prepared pan.
2. Bake for 60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
- Cool the bread in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
- Remove from the pan and cool slightly before serving.
- Serve warm, or allow to cool completely for later serving.
